meta.title: Iran’s Missile Proliferation: A Conversation with Special Envoy Brian Hook
meta.description: On September 19, Hudson Institute hosted a discussion with Brian Hook, who was recently named special envoy to Iran and will lead the Iran Action Group. The discussion will be moderated by Hudson Senior Fellow Rebeccah Heinrichs and will consider Iran’s missile proliferation and United States’ efforts to stop it and mitigate its effects.
